name: Tidy Coach
description: Conversational protocol (tone, propose-then-ratify rules, tidy-engine interaction) for the TidyData Anna App. Declarative skill defined in SKILL.md.
_comment: Declarative skill (no runtime plugin). The skill body lives in SKILL.md. This dir is the `tidy-coach` handle referenced by app.json#bundled_executas. `anna-app dev` ignores skills (nothing to run).
